notes: Works perfectly and performance is just like on Windows. However to get the game running you have to remove the GFWL folder from the game's root directory and extract the files from this archive (https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/576-bulletstorm-xlivedll/) into the game's root directory before launching the game for the first time.
title: F1 2011

cpu: AMD A8-4555M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: You need to delete GFWL folder from the game and patch XLIVE (https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/576-bulletstorm-xlivedll/) with this. Just drop it to root directory. I also needed to use Wine D3D11 (PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%) as the game crashed just after splash without it.
title: F1 2011

notes: Runs perfectly with performance equal to or better than Windows and does not require any runtime config options. However, before launching the game for the first time, you have to remove the GFWL folder from the game's root directory and extract the files from this archive (https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/576-bulletstorm-xlivedll/) into the game's root directory.
title: F1 2011
